title: feishu_bitable_publish_form
description: Phase 2 (publish/share) of converting a Feishu bitable into a questionnaire. ONLY call this AFTER: (1) feishu_bitable_draft_form returned a draft, AND (2) a human has approved it. You MUST pass the exact draft_session_id from phase 1's response. The agent will find the existing form view (NOT create a new one), click the 'Share Form' button in the top-right corner, enable form sharing, wait ~2 seconds for the link to appear, and return the final shareable questionnaire URL.

query.description: Natural-language instruction. MUST contain the SAME Feishu bitable URL that was used in phase 1. This is required for the agent to navigate to the correct workspace.
examples: 请把这个飞书多维表格转成问卷：https://lexmount.feishu.cn/wiki/DrETwmLEmiHUZ9kDkAsctla5nkK

draft_session_id.description: REQUIRED. The exact draft_session_id value returned by feishu_bitable_draft_form's response. This is a single-use token that expires after DRAFT_SESSION_TTL_SEC (default 1800s). The server will reject the request if the draft_session_id does not match the bitable_url or auth profile from phase 1.

human_confirmation_notes.description: Optional human review feedback or edit instructions. The agent will apply these edits BEFORE opening the share dialog. Example: '题目内容已经确认，请点击右上角分享表单，开启表单分享，并返回最终真实问卷链接。'
examples: 题目内容已经确认，请点击右上角分享表单，开启表单分享，并返回最终真实问卷链接。

headless.description: Whether to run the browser in headless mode.

profile_id.description: Server-side stored auth profile id. If omitted, the service falls back to FEISHU_DEFAULT_PROFILE_ID.

storage_state.description: Playwright storage state JSON object for an already logged-in Feishu session.

storage_state_path.description: Path to an existing Feishu storage state file inside the container.

sensitive_data.description: Optional Browser Use sensitive_data payload for login assistance.
